variants.title: MicroFit® UltraGen III MFHC60175 Coreless Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 169400TH20XLS000P

specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 20µ @ β200

variants.title: Donaldson P164225 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge | Replaces the Eppensteiner 169400TH20XLS000P
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P164225 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge is designed to provide superior protection for your hydraulic system, effectively capturing contaminants to ensure clean fluid circulation. With high-quality filtration media, it extends equipment life, improves operational efficiency, and maintains fluid cleanliness even in the most demanding environments. Built for industrial, agricultural, and heavy-duty applications, this filter offers excellent dirt-holding capacity and flow efficiency. Its easy installation and maintenance help reduce downtime, making it a reliable choice for keeping hydraulic systems running smoothly.
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 20µ @ β200

variants.title: Filtrec C212G25V Coreless Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 169400TH20XLS000P
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec C212G25V. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the C212G25V provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
